notes: Scenario 2.17 trailing-? path for mistral-vibe. Vibe emits a plain-text terminal turn_done (role assistant, no tool_calls) whose AssistantText ends in '?'; the generic classifier's IsWaitingForUserInput → state_classifier.go rule 2a drives ready → working → waiting. The recipe stops at the waiting episode and does NOT answer. Vibe emits no explicit waiting signal — this is the agent-agnostic path, same as claudecode. Observations: agent exact-match + tokens_nonzero (sidecar stats.context_tokens, emitted on turn_done); model left provisional (NormalizeModelName transform) for record to pin; cost NOT asserted (sidecar reads no cost field).

text: Terminal turn_done AssistantText ends in '?' → waiting (IsWaitingForUserInput → rule 2a); recipe stops here
